edges.description: Logo and primary action button coexist in header
Card visibility changes based on theme selection
Risk meter is child component of IA diagnostic card
Warmup Manager link embedded in System Status card
Sidebar navigation controls main content area
Control buttons manage the warmup panel state
Warmup panel displayed in main dashboard content
Both are primary action affordances in UI
Loading skeleton precedes diagnostics card rendering
Theme switch affects loading state appearance
